description: Tisane is a natural language processing service focused on text analysis and problematic-content detection. It provides functions such as parsing, language detection, transformation, and language-model inspection via its cloud API.
summary: Tisane exposes one authenticated REST API at https://api.tisane.ai, documented on docs.tisane.ai and secured with a developer-issued subscription key sent in `Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key`.
